name: Scout
note: Militia starter. Gives target -1 initiative — civilians watching the road.

name: Archer
note: Militia starter. Focus — pick a single target and don't switch.

name: Brute
note: Militia starter. Big lad with a club; nobody trained him.

name: Tracker
note: Requires Tracking. Marks a target — gives them -2 initiative.

name: Shield Bearer
note: Requires Stick fighting. Covers an ally — soaks the first hit aimed past him.

name: Stick Fighter
note: Requires Stick fighting. Vanilla pole-and-strike.

name: Knife Fighter
note: Requires Knives. First strike — quick, no armor.

name: Hunter
note: Requires Hunting Grounds. Focus — snipes one quarry at a time.

name: Jeep Archer
note: Auto unit (focus). Without a working car: stats halve and initiative drops to 1.

name: Mounted Scout
note: Requires Horseback riding. Gives target -1 initiative; needs a horse to keep its speed.

name: Axeman
note: Requires Stick fighting + metalworking. Wood haft, steel head — stops a lot.

name: Spearman
note: Requires Stick fighting. Reach + thrust — the working soldier.

name: Sentry
note: Requires Lookout. +1 initiative on round 1 — watches the wall.

name: Watchman
note: Requires Lookout. Gives an ally +1 initiative on round 1. +1 range on Tower.

name: Town Guard
note: Requires Town Watch + Walls (tech). Patrols the gate — solid against raiders.

name: Decoy
note: Requires Distraction. Draws first attack.

name: Martial Artist
note: Requires Stick fighting + Discipline. Slow to start; lethal once landed.

name: Truck Rammer
note: Auto unit (armor). Without auto: half stats, no armor.

name: Medic
note: Requires First Aid + Medic. Heal +2 on the most damaged ally.

name: Cutter
note: Requires Knives + Forge (building). Steel sidearm, drilled.

name: Recon Drone
note: Requires Fix electronics. On flip: reveal next battle card before committing.

name: Skirmisher
note: Requires Light Armor. Hit-and-run — after attacking, can't be targeted next turn.

name: Bushman
note: Requires Camo + Ranger Doctrine. Ignores cover.

name: Battle Medic
note: Requires First Aid + Field Medicine. Heal +3.

name: Trumpeter
note: Requires Discipline. Team +1 initiative on round 1.

name: Pikeman
note: Requires Phalanx. First strike vs cavalry.

name: Bear Handler
note: Requires Animals + Beast Tamer. Splash — the bear is an area effect.

name: War Dog
note: Requires Animals. First strike — bites before swords land.

name: Ranger
note: Requires Camo. Focus.

name: Light Cavalry
note: Requires Horseback riding + Cavalry Doctrine. Fast wheeling unit.

name: Standard Bearer
note: Requires Tactics. Team +1 attack while in play.

name: Recruit Sergeant
note: Requires Leadership + Tactics. Team +1 attack, focus.

name: Halberdier
note: Requires Phalanx + metalworking. First strike vs cavalry.

name: Trapper
note: Requires Traps. After attack, increases target initiative +5 (delays them).

name: Bomber
note: Requires Bombs + Chemistry. 3 uses, splash.

name: Trebuchet
note: Requires Engineering + Math. 2 uses, skip turn to reload, +3 attack vs boss, splash.

name: Crossbowman
note: Requires Big guns + Mechanics. Focus.

name: Truck Gunner
note: Auto unit (armor). Without auto: stats halve.

name: Berserker
note: Requires Shock Troops. Aggressive doctrine — keeps swinging.

name: Field Doctor
note: Requires First Aid + Triage. Heal +6.

name: Advanced Cutter
note: Requires Knives + Smithy (building) + Forge (building). The settlement's edge.

name: Saboteur
note: Requires Sneak + Ambush. First strike, ignores armor.

name: Stealth Team
note: Requires Sneak + Ambush + Camo. First strike, ignores cover.

name: Combat Engineer
note: Requires Engineering + Pioneers. +2 defense to one ally.

name: Mechanic
note: Requires Fix car. Repairs an auto ally for +3 health.

name: Sapper
note: Requires Bombs + Demolitions. Splash, 2 uses — small charges, big holes. +1 strength on Forge.

name: Witch Doctor
note: Requires First Aid + Anatomy. Heal +4, removes one debuff.

name: Marksman
note: Requires Small guns + Riflery + Bullet manufacturing. Focus.

name: Designated Marksman
note: Requires Small guns + Riflery + Sharpshooting. Focus, +2 vs ranged.

name: Small Gunner
note: Requires Small guns + Bullet manufacturing. The standard rifleman.

name: Granader
note: Requires Bombs + Demolitions. 1 use, skip turn to reload, splash.

name: Rifle Squad
note: Requires Small guns + Riflery + Cover Fire. Focus.

name: Heavy Cavalry
requires: Horseback riding + Cavalry Doctrine + Plate Armor
note: Requires Horseback riding + Cavalry Doctrine + Plate Armor. Stables (building) helps.

name: Lancer
note: Requires Horseback riding + Cavalry Doctrine. First strike.

name: Riot Squad
note: Requires Armor + Plate Armor. Heavy infantry.

name: Paladin
note: Requires Armor + Plate Armor + Religion. Heal +1, armor.

name: Humve Gunner
requires: Hotwire car + Small guns + Auto Doctrine
note: Auto unit (armor). Without auto: stats halve.

name: Car gunner
requires: Hotwire car + Big guns + Auto Doctrine
note: -2 attack against boss, armor. Auto unit.

name: Machine Gunner
note: Requires Big guns + Bullet manufacturing. Heavy emplacement.

name: Long Gunner
note: Requires Small guns + Sharpshooting. Focus.

name: Sniper
note: Requires Sniping + Small guns. Cannot be healed; -3 initiative on turn 1.

name: Camo Sniper
note: Requires Sniping + Camo + Optics. Focus, ignores cover.

name: Field Engineer
note: Requires Fix car + Engineering. +2 defense to one auto ally.

name: Battle Mage
note: Requires Chemistry + Chemistry II. Splash, ignores armor.

name: Flame Trooper
note: Requires Chemistry II + Bullet manufacturing. Splash, ignores cover.

name: Mortar Team
note: Requires Big guns + Heavy Weapons. 2 uses, splash, skip to reload.

name: MG Nest
requires: Big guns + Heavy Weapons + Trench Warfare
note: Requires Heavy Weapons + Trench Warfare. Splash, immobile.

name: Army
note: Requires Tactics + Discipline + Logistics. Armor — a real standing army.

name: Machine Gunner Team
requires: Big guns + Heavy Weapons + Cover Fire
note: Requires Heavy Weapons + Cover Fire. Focus.

name: Big Gunner
note: Requires Big guns + Heavy Weapons. Splash, focus.

name: Car Tank
requires: Hotwire car + Big guns + Auto Doctrine + Combined Arms
note: Auto unit (armor). Without auto: stats halve.

name: Advanced Car Tank
requires: Hotwire car + Big guns + Auto Doctrine + Combined Arms + Plate Armor
note: Auto unit (armor). Late-tier — needs the full armor stack.

name: Bazooka
note: Requires Heavy Weapons + Demolitions. 2 uses, splash.

name: War Elephant
note: Requires Animals + Beast Tamer. Splash, armor — exotic and slow.

name: Heavy Howitzer
requires: Hotwire car + Big guns + Heavy Weapons + Anti-Boss Doctrine
note: Requires Heavy Weapons + Anti-Boss Doctrine. Splash, 2 uses, skip to reload, +5 vs boss.

name: Drone Swarm
note: Requires Fix electronics + Drone Tactics. Splash, ignores cover, focus.
